input.headline: Dancing with the Stars' season 34: See who was eliminated, who's headed to finale

raw.headline: Dancing with the Stars' season 34: See who was eliminated, who's headed to finale

winner: The dancers on *Dancing with the Stars* Season 34 were eliminated in such precise intervals that one contestant joked, "I didn’t realize we were auditioning for a choreography of *March of the Penguins*—no survival skills required!

candidates.text: I watched Dancing with the Stars to see who was eliminated, but I ended up being the one who got kicked out of my own living room for trying to join in.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Funny twist on the headline with a relatable and surprising scenario."}

candidates.text: I'm glad you asked! The winner of *Dancing with the Stars* isn't the best dancer—it's just the contestant who hasn’t fallen yet.

candidates.text: I tried to dance my way out of a bad date, but my partner said, "Sorry, I'm heading straight to the finale of our relationship.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 7.5, "reason": "The joke is clever and ties the headline to a personal anecdote with a twist, but it's slightly generic and lacks the specificity of the show's context."}

candidates.text: Why did the *Dancing with the Stars* contestant get kicked off the show? Because they kept stepping on their partner’s feet—and also on the headlines!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 7.5, "reason": "The joke is clever and ties the show's elimination to a play on 'headlines,' which is specific and surprising. However, it could be more concise and has a slight awkwardness in phrasing."}

candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.2, "reason": "The joke is concise, specific, and surprising with a clever comparison to *March of the Penguins*. It naturally ties into the elimination theme and uses humor effectively without being offensive or generic."}

candidates.text: The judges were so confused by the elimination that they decided to vote on whether the contestant was a star or just a member of the constellation.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.2, "reason": "The joke is concise, surprising, and specific to the context of 'Dancing with the Stars,' using a clever play on 'star' and 'constellation.' It's funnily absurd yet natural in tone."}

candidates.text: The judges were so impressed by the dancers that they decided to eliminate the entire studio audience just to make sure the finale had enough room for everyone to breathe.
